title: Car
description: A physical DeepRacer vehicle registered to an AWS account.

vehicleArn.description: The ARN uniquely identifying the DeepRacer vehicle.

vehicleName.description: The display name of the vehicle.

fleetArn.description: The ARN of the fleet this vehicle belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the vehicle was registered.

lastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp when the vehicle was last updated.
